description.p: altirraqt is a Linux/Qt6 port of Avery Lee's Altirra, an accurate emulator of the Atari 800 / 800XL / 130XE / 5200 home computers and game console. It runs disk images (ATR, XEX, ATX), cartridge ROMs (CAR, BIN, A52), and cassette tapes (CAS, WAV) with cycle-accurate ANTIC, GTIA and POKEY emulation, a full debugger, hardware compatibility database, and a configurable HUD.
The bundled AltirraOS kernel and Altirra BASIC ROMs are provided under a permissive BSD license so the emulator works out of the box without needing the original Atari ROMs.
Initial release of the Qt port.
